title: ‘Government’s semiconductor mission will promote research’: MeitY Additional Secretary
description: Though India accounts for nearly 20% of the world’s semiconductor design engineers, it doesn’t have its own design firms, says Amitesh Kumar Sinha, Additional Secretary, Electronics and IT Ministry, at the The Hindu Deep Tech Summit; the India Semiconductor Mission 2.0 will expand beyond the first phase to include research and development, equipment manufacturing and skilling, he adds
